name: ssdt-master
description: Complete SQL Server Data Tools (SSDT) expertise across all platforms. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) any SSDT task (database projects/SqlPackage/schema compare), (2) SDK-style and legacy project creation/migration, (3) DACPAC/BACPAC build and deploy, (4) SqlPackage CLI operations, (5) schema and data comparison, (6) refactoring, (7) MSBuild and CI/CD, (8) deployment script generation. Provides: full SqlPackage parameter reference, SDK-style project structure, deployment options, GitHub Actions/Azure DevOps patterns.
